phases.name: Signals Generation
phases.prompt: You are an expert financial quant analyst. Scan incoming JSON streams for RSI divergence > 15% and MACD crossovers on 5m intervals. Flag high-volatility events for downstream analysis...

phases.name: Sentiment Analysis
phases.prompt: Process headline data from Reuters and Bloomberg. Cross-reference with X (Twitter) sentiment flow for $BTC and $ETH. Output a normalized score between -1.0 and 1.0.
